name: Turkish Delight 2
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Extract (e.g., orange, lemon, or raspberry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently mix gelatin with cold water until it softens.
2. Dissolve sugar in boiling water.
3. Add softened gelatin to the sugar mixture and stir well.
4. Place the mixture over low heat and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the extract and food coloring.
6. Pour the mixture into an ungreased, 8-inch square pan.
7. Scatter chopped pistachios on top of the gelatin layer.
8. Allow the mixture to cool until it reaches room temperature.
9. Chill completely until firm.
10. Invert the pan onto a cutting board and cut into 1 1/2 inch cubes.
11. Roll the cubes in confectioners' sugar to coat evenly.
12. Store the Turkish delight in a jar at room temperature.
13. Serve with Greek Coffee.
